author: ops-lead
text: Our support queue keeps growing and manual ticket triage is eating the whole morning. Has anyone fixed this without adding another coordinator?

author: product-builder
text: We keep missing customer messages because requests land in three different places. I need a shared inbox that the whole team can trust.

author: support-manager
query: looking for a shared customer inbox
text: Looking for a support tool for a five-person team. Can anyone recommend a help desk that keeps setup simple?

author: researcher
text: Student assignment seeking survey participants who have experience with manual ticket triage.

author: concerned-customer
text: Our old support system may have exposed customer records in a data leak. The support queue keeps growing while the team investigates.
